Style Definition: Official 2026 brand standard optimized for dark mode presentations, emphasizing deep backgrounds with high-contrast white copy and vibrant accents.
Illustration Motif: Clean, monoline tech iconography (e.g., shields, identity nodes, user profiles, key-locks) replacing proprietary product icons. Strict avoidance of complex abstract illustrations.
Graphic Execution: High-contrast dark mode layouts utilizing deep black backgrounds. White crisp 2D line-art for primary UI and graphic outlines. Vibrant aqua and hot pink used strictly as glowing accents for active states or focal points.
Rationale: Shifts the default visual hierarchy to the approved dark mode palette, correcting the over-exposure of light backgrounds while maintaining strict brand compliance.

Style Definition: Core enterprise identity design: clean, Poppins-based, structured cloud maps, emphasizing digital security perimeters.
Illustration Motif: Abstract floating nodes, interconnected cloud architectures, secure access gates, identity flowcharts.
Graphic Execution: Flat 2D vector illustrations, crisp geometric shapes, monochromatic cobalt palette with glowing accent blue highlights. No 3D objects.
Rationale: Adapts the core identity brand into a strict 2D vector format, ideal for general software demonstrations and SaaS topologies.

Style Definition: Highly secure, authoritative design emphasizing trust, compliance, and impenetrable financial infrastructure.
Illustration Motif: Heavy bank vaults, interlocking gears, secure cryptographic chains, ledgers, protective shields.
Graphic Execution: Heavy solid 3D geometry, subtle metallic silver/gold gradients, clean symmetrical layouts, photorealistic security elements.
Rationale: Pivots the identity theme to physical security metaphors using weighty 3D elements for financial and banking audiences.

Style Definition: Structural, highly organized grid layouts representing complex supply chains and foundational identity builds.
Illustration Motif: Architectural scaffolding, literal building blocks, cranes lifting identity nodes, factory assembly lines.
Graphic Execution: Isometric 3D designs, sharp bento-box grid layouts, blueprint wireframe lines on stark white backgrounds, zero soft drop shadows.
Rationale: Uses isometric architectural block structures to visualize identity governance as a physical, manufactured supply chain.

Style Definition: Dark mode, terminal-inspired aesthetic focusing on backend operations, code execution, and raw data flow.
Illustration Motif: Circuit boards, glowing electronics, server racks, fiber optic data streams, terminal windows.
Graphic Execution: Cybernetic monoline vectors, deep black backgrounds, glowing neon green accents, HUD (Head-Up Display) data charts.
Rationale: Tailored for technical engineering and DevOps audiences by executing the brand in a glowing, dark-mode hardware aesthetic.

Style Definition: Clean, sterile but approachable design focusing on life sciences, compliance, and fluid organic connections.
Illustration Motif: DNA helixes, fluid network nodes, secure molecular structures, interlocking medical pill shapes.
Graphic Execution: Claymorphism (soft rounded 3D UI), smooth drop shadows, clean white layouts, avoiding sharp/aggressive angles.
Rationale: Softens the technical edge into a sterile but friendly rounded 'clay' 3D style suitable for medical and biotech presentations.

Style Definition: High contrast, hyper-accessible, citizen-focused design that prioritizes clarity, universal standards, and human impact.
Illustration Motif: Human-centric interactions, official civic documents, diverse community networks, universal system diagrams.
Graphic Execution: Thick high-contrast 2D line strokes, stylized cartoonish illustrations of diverse humans, extensive use of patterns over color-coding.
Rationale: Translates identity security into a highly accessible, flat, human-centric cartoon style for public sector compliance.

Style Definition: High-energy, fast-moving design representing consumer identity, frictionless checkout, and rapid global logistics.
Illustration Motif: Conveyor belts, flowing user journeys, shopping nodes, interconnected global maps, directional arrows.
Graphic Execution: Dynamic glassmorphism, translucent overlapping glass panels, blurred mesh backgrounds, speed trails implying fast parallax motion.
Rationale: Uses translucent glass and vibrant underlying mesh gradients to represent the speed and frictionless nature of retail tech.

Style Definition: Macro-focused, highly detailed interface design representing device-level identity and the Internet of Things.
Illustration Motif: Microchips, motherboards, mechanical switches, hardware pins, tactile control panels.
Graphic Execution: Crisp pixel-perfect 2D flat design, macro close-ups of mechanical UI interfaces, rigid geometric layouts, subtle inner shadows.
Rationale: Zooms in on the physical hardware components, using rigid flat design to represent the structural connections of IoT devices.

Style Definition: Minimalist, functional, white-space heavy design focused purely on the presentation of complex logical research.
Illustration Motif: Libraries of data, branching mind-maps, literal foundational pillars, logical flowcharts.
Graphic Execution: Strict neo-brutalist 2D, severe high-contrast shapes, distinct black outlines, vast negative space, stark architectural grids.
Rationale: Strips all decorative fluff to create a highly academic, wireframe-style blueprint aesthetic for deep research presentations.

Style Definition: High-level, premium visual style focusing on market vision, risk reduction, and executive-level identity metrics.
Illustration Motif: Mountain peaks, high-level strategic compasses, giant metric readouts, wide-angle horizons.
Graphic Execution: Premium high-impact photography combined with sleek UI overlays, dramatic spotlighting, expansive negative space.
Rationale: Replaces abstract vectors with premium photography and dramatic lighting to focus purely on high-altitude executive vision.

Style Definition: Versatile, direct, and universally applicable design emphasizing clean whitespace and straightforward messaging.
Illustration Motif: Simplified SaaS UI blocks, isolated key objects, fundamental geometric shapes.
Graphic Execution: Ultra-clean wireframe art, highly simplified 2D flat vectors, zero decorative background elements, vast white space.
Rationale: Provides a neutral, distraction-free baseline for any topic, focusing entirely on clean typography and simple geometry.

Style Definition: Feature-focused aesthetic designed for embedded walkthroughs, emphasizing interactive software states.
Illustration Motif: Application interface wireframes, magnified active cursors, sequential process steps.
Graphic Execution: Holographic graphic style, high-fidelity SaaS UI mockups glowing over dark layers, neon aqua indicators for interactive points.
Rationale: Adopts a futuristic glowing UI execution to clearly differentiate active product demonstrations from static architectural charts.

Style Definition: High-energy, engaging presentation style designed for large audiences, focusing on momentum and forward progress.
Illustration Motif: Flowing energy lines, directional arrows, dynamic abstract waves, sweeping global curves.
Graphic Execution: Smooth mesh gradients, implied motion graphics, sweeping translucent shapes with soft overlapping color blends.
Rationale: Uses sweeping gradients and motion-implied shapes to create an energetic backdrop for major announcements.

Style Definition: Friendly, human-first aesthetic designed to communicate company updates, training, and cultural initiatives.
Illustration Motif: Organic community clusters, smiling diverse avatars, communication speech bubbles, collaborative hands.
Graphic Execution: Hand-drawn or highly stylized vector illustrations, friendly thick welcoming strokes, warm accent colors, rounded organic borders.
Rationale: Strips away the technical rigidity of standard tech branding, opting for a soft, approachable, human-focused illustrative style.

Style Definition: Highly focused, persuasive layout designed to drive audience action, emphasizing ROI and success metrics.
Illustration Motif: Target reticles, upward growth charts, physical funnels, bold success checkmarks.
Graphic Execution: High-contrast flat design forcing attention to focal points using the accent orange, stark directional visual cues, minimal background distraction.
Rationale: Highly focused visual layout employing literal funnel and target iconography with stark contrast to aggressively drive action.
